common.notSignedIn: You need to sign in first.
common.rateLimited: You’re doing that too often — try again in {seconds}s.
common.profileSyncFailed: We couldn’t load your profile. Try again.
common.imageUnsupportedType: Unsupported image type. Use PNG, JPEG, WebP or GIF.
common.imageTooLarge: File is too large. Max {max} MB.

projectForm.titleRequiredCreate: Give your project a title first.
projectForm.descriptionRequiredCreate: Add a short description so people know what they’re joining.
projectForm.unknownStepSkill: Unknown skill on one of the steps.

projectEdit.onlyLeadOrAdmin: Only the project lead or an organisation admin can edit this project.
projectEdit.stepNotInProject: One of the steps doesn’t belong to this project.

projectJoin.alreadyMember: You’re already a member of this project.
projectJoin.joinBeforeClaimingStep: Join the project before claiming a step.
projectJoin.stepNotFound: Step not found in this project.

steps.joinProjectFirst: Join the project to work on its steps.
steps.joinStepFirst: Join this step before changing it.
steps.onlyLeadSetsCoordinator: Only the project lead can change coordinators.
steps.coordinatorNotOnStep: That user isn’t currently on this step.

mySteps.invalidHours: Enter a valid number of hours.
mySteps.maxHours: That’s too much — log at most {max}h per entry.
mySteps.joinBeforeLogging: Join the step before logging time on it.
mySteps.deleteOwnLogsOnly: You can only delete your own log entries.
mySteps.deleteLogFailed: Could not delete that log entry.

updates.onlyLead: Only the project lead can post updates.
updates.onlyAuthorEdit: Only the author can edit an update.

blueprints.parentIsVariant: You can only adapt root blueprints — that one is already a variant.
blueprints.variantNeedsLocale: A variant needs a language or a country so people can tell it apart.
blueprints.onlyCreator: Only the blueprint creator can edit it.
blueprints.ownParent: A blueprint can’t be its own parent.
blueprints.hasVariantsAlready: This blueprint already has variants of its own, so it can’t become a variant itself.
blueprints.stepNotOwned: One of the steps doesn’t belong to this blueprint.

orgs.notAMember: You are not a member of that organisation.
orgs.orgNotActiveOwner: That organisation is not active yet, so it cannot own projects.
orgs.adminsOnly: Only organisation admins can do this.
orgs.nameRequired: Give the organisation a name (at least 3 characters).
orgs.intendedUseTooShort: Tell us a little more about how you plan to use it (at least 20 characters).
orgs.invitesRequireActive: Invites are only available once the organisation is active.
orgs.inviteCodeCollision: Could not create an invite code. Try again.
orgs.inviteCreateFailed: Could not create an invite code.
orgs.emailInvalid: That does not look like an email address.
orgs.inviteCodeUnknown: That invite code does not exist.
orgs.orgNotAcceptingMembers: This organisation is not accepting new members right now.
orgs.inviteCancelled: This invite code has been cancelled.
orgs.inviteMaxUses: This invite code has been used the maximum number of times.
orgs.inviteWrongEmail: This invite was sent to a different email address.
orgs.alreadyMember: You are already a member of this organisation.
orgs.inviteNoLongerValid: This invite code is no longer valid.
orgs.notMemberOfThisOrg: You are not a member of this organisation.
orgs.lastAdmin: You are the only admin. Make another member an admin before you leave.
orgs.notActiveMember: That person is not an active member.
orgs.ownerCannotBeRemoved: The organisation creator cannot be removed.
orgs.rolesRequireActive: Roles can only change once the organisation is active.
orgs.websiteTooLong: Keep the website address under 200 characters.

messages.deleteOwnOnly: You can only delete your own messages.

notifications.notAJoinRequest: This notification isn’t a join request.
notifications.onlyLeadCanResolve: Only the project lead can resolve this.
notifications.joinRequestMissingContributionId: Join request is missing the contribution id.
notifications.acceptFailed: Could not accept the join request.
notifications.declineFailed: Could not decline the join request.

profile.skillNotFound: One of the skills does not exist.
